narrative:
Clinton Township has 1,890 registered voters, with 55.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.0% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.2%, a pronounced Republican lean of 23.8 percentage points.
